critical_code_review_comments: Initiative and Project Detail pages properly display all required fields
Edit mode correctly shows editable fields with dropdowns/inputs for all configurable fields
Team members can be added/deleted from both Initiative and Project pages
Status history is automatically tracked when status changes via API
Milestones and Issues CRUD operations work correctly with proper modal dialogs
Business Unit dropdown uses predefined list (IT, Sales, Manufacturing, etc.)
Delivery Stages use toggleable buttons for multi-select functionality
data-testid='initiative-detail' and data-testid='project-detail-page' are present for testing
seed_data_creation: Seed data already exists with initiatives (ETO, Quality, Planning, Manufacturing Visibility, Intercompany) and projects with team_members, business_unit, delivery_stages_impacted, milestones, and issues
context_for_next_testing_agent: Initiative and Project Detail pages are fully functional. Edit mode works for all fields including team_members, business_unit, and delivery_stages_impacted. Milestones and Issues CRUD operations work via API and UI modals. Status history is automatically tracked when status changes.

initiatives.GET /api/strategic-initiatives/{id}: Returns all fields including team_members, business_unit, delivery_stages_impacted, status_history
initiatives.PUT /api/strategic-initiatives/{id}: Updates all fields, auto-tracks status history

projects.GET /api/projects/{id}: Returns all fields including team_members, business_unit, delivery_stages_impacted, status_history, milestones, issues
projects.PUT /api/projects/{id}: Updates all fields, auto-tracks status history
